items.raw_excerpt: Police in Kirishima City, Kagoshima Prefecture, said Friday that a body found in a river is likely that of a 5-year-old boy who went missing while bathing with his family at a hot spring facility in June. Police said the body was that of a boy approximately 115 centimeters tall…
items.summary_en: Police in Kirishima City, Kagoshima Prefecture, said a body found in a river is likely that of a 5-year-old boy who went missing while bathing with his family at a hot spring resort in June. The boy was approximately 115 centimeters tall. He had been missing since June.
items.summary_ko: 가고시마현 기리시마시 경찰은 지난 6월 가족과 함께 온천 시설에서 목욕 중 실종된 5세 소년의 시신으로 추정되는 유해가 강에서 발견됐다고 발표했다. 발견된 시신의 신장은 약 115cm 정도였다. 소년은 지난 6월부터 실종 상태였다.
items.title_en: Body found near hot spring resort believed to be missing 5-year-old boy
items.title_ko: 온천 리조트 근처에서 발견된 시신, 6월 실종된 5세 소년으로 추정
items.title_original: Body found near hot spring resort believed to be 5-year-old boy who went missing in June

items.raw_excerpt: A 14-year-old boy has been detained by police after a pepper spray incident at a municipal junior high school in Kaizuka City, Osaka Prefecture, on Friday. A school employee called 119 at around 10:40 a.m. and said that someone had sprayed a substance, TV Asahi reported. According to police, 16…
items.summary_en: A 14-year-old boy was detained by police after pepper spray was set off at a junior high school in Kaizuka City, Osaka Prefecture. A school employee called emergency services on Friday morning after the substance was sprayed. Sixteen people were affected by the incident.
items.summary_ko: 오사카부 카이즈카시의 한 중학교에서 후추 스프레이가 분사되는 사건이 발생해 14세 소년이 경찰에 연행됐다. 금요일 오전 학교 직원이 119에 신고했으며, 이번 사건으로 16명이 영향을 받았다.
items.title_en: Boy detained after pepper spray at school in Osaka
items.title_ko: 오사카 중학교에서 후추 스프레이 사건, 14세 소년 경찰에 연행
items.title_original: 14-year-old boy detained after pepper spray incident at school

items.raw_excerpt: Security was enhanced at Jantar Mantar and Safdarjung Hospital after activist Sonam Wangchuk was hospitalized amid protests.
items.summary_en: Police increased security at Jantar Mantar and Safdarjung Hospital in Delhi after activist Sonam Wangchuk was moved there during ongoing protests. Wangchuk, known for his work in Ladakh, had been on a hunger strike to demand statehood for the region. The move sparked tensions and prompted authorities to deploy extra officers at both locations.
items.summary_ko: 라다크 주지사 지위와 주민 자율권을 요구하며 단식 투쟁을 이어오던 활동가 손암 왕추크가 병원으로 이송된 뒤, 델리 자타르 마타르와 샤프다르주ング 병원 일대에 경찰 경비가 강화되었다. 이송 소식이 알려지자 시위대와 경찰 사이에 긴장이 고조되었고, 당국은 양쪽 장소에 추가 병력을 배치했다.
items.title_en: Security tightened at Delhi protest site after activist Wangchuk hospitalized
items.title_ko: 델리 시위 현장, 활동가 왕추크 병원 이송 후 경비 강화
items.title_original: Security tightened at Jantar Mantar, Safdarjung Hospital after Wangchuk shifted amid protest row

items.raw_excerpt: The 36 constituencies will see 11 straight fights, 21 three-cornered contests, two four-cornered contests and two five-cornered contests.
items.summary_en: 103 candidates have been nominated to contest 36 state constituencies in Negeri Sembilan. The contests include 11 straight fights, 21 three-cornered races, and several multi-cornered battles. Barisan Nasional and Perikatan Nasional will campaign for each other in this unusual alliance.
items.summary_ko: 네게리 셈비란 주의회 선거에 36개 선거구에서 103명의 후보가 등록했다. 11개 선거구는 양자 대결, 21개는 3자 대결, 나머지는 4~5명이 경쟁하는 구도다. 바리산 내셔널과 페리카탄 내셔널이 이번 선거에서 서로를 지지하며 캠페인을 펼친다.
items.title_en: Negeri Sembilan State Election: 103 Candidates Nominate for 36 Seats
items.title_ko: 네게리 셈비란 주의회 선거: 36개 선거구에 103명 후보 등록
items.title_original: Negeri Sembilan electoral battle begins after 103 candidates confirmed; BN, PN to campaign for each other

items.raw_excerpt: A prominent member of Chancellor Friedrich Merz's centre-right party came under fire on Friday for having a child through a surrogate pregnancy in the United States, despite the practice being illegal in Germany.
items.summary_en: A senior member of Chancellor Merz's centre-right party was criticized for having a child through a surrogate in the United States. Surrogacy is illegal in Germany, and the lawmaker's choice sparked debate about hypocrisy. The case renewed discussion about whether Germany should change its surrogacy ban.
items.summary_ko: 메르츠 총리의 기독교민주연합 소속 중진 의원이 미국에서 대리모 출산으로 아이를 얻은 사실이 드러나 비판을 받았다. 독일에서 대리모 시술은 불법이며, 이 의원의 선택이 위선 논란을 일으켰다. 이번 사건으로 독일의 대리모 금지법을 재검토해야 한다는 논의가 다시 촉발되었다.
items.title_en: German Lawmaker Faces Criticism for Using US Surrogate
items.title_ko: 독일 여당 의원, 미국 대리모 논란으로 비판 받아
items.title_original: German lawmaker faces criticism for US surrogacy to have a child

items.raw_excerpt: The two-year pilot scheme will run from Aug 3, 2026 to Jul 31, 2028.
items.summary_en: Singapore is launching a new pilot scheme allowing approved fosterers to keep cats in HDB flats and private homes. From Aug 3, 2026 to Jul 31, 2028, approved fosterers can keep up to 6 cats in HDB flats or 10 in private homes.
items.summary_ko: 싱가포르는 2026년 8월 3일부터 2028년 7월 31일까지 신규 시범사업을 시작합니다. 심사 통과한 대리인은 HDB 아파트에 최대 6마리, 민간 주택에 최대 10마리까지 고양이를 보관할 수 있습니다.
items.title_en: Approved fosterers may keep up to 6 cats in HDB flats, 10 in private homes under new pilot scheme
items.title_ko: 심사 통과한 대리인은 HDB 아파트에 최대 6마리, 민간 주택에 최대 10마리 고양이를 보관할 수 있는 시범사업
items.title_original: Approved fosterers may keep up to 6 cats in HDB flats, 10 in private homes under new pilot scheme
